title: Tiny Pixels
description: A clean 8x8 pack with a vibrant style
body:
![Tiny Pixels](https://imgur.com/uEMcG.png)

Welcome to tiny pixels a pack with vibrant colors and smooth textures that keeps within the feel of vanilla while still straying quite far stylistically.

[![Mod Support](https://i.imgur.com/SlUuBGM.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/tiny-pixels-mod-support)

![Credits](https://i.imgur.com/MGKgleH.png)

Many thanks to all the people listed below
- Leostereo for the original pack
-Pavo_Reality for the maintenance of the pack up until this point and for entrusting me to update the pack
- Fiftyniner for his font
- Lilyo for the amazing banner
- DaniCherryJam texture polishing and 3d model magics
- And all you folks who have liked and downloaded this pack!
